primary_function: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify output does not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Arial
Confirm implementation includes working HTML/CSS/JS code
Ensure design has a clear, bold aesthetic direction stated upfront
Validate typography choices include distinctive display and body font pairing
Verify color scheme uses CSS variables for consistency
Confirm animations are implemented with CSS or appropriate motion libraries
Ensure layout breaks away from predictable patterns with spatial creativity
Verify backgrounds include atmospheric effects rather than solid colors
Confirm code complexity matches the aesthetic vision (elaborate for maximalist, precise for minimalist)
Validate output avoids purple gradients on white backgrounds and other cliched schemes
trigger_text: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI).
